name: executor_skill
description: Data engineering and app composition executor for the MEF subnational efficiency MCP project.
prompt: Act as the executor agent. Parse user period arguments such as 'period 2025-12' or '2025-Q4'. Use MCP tools only for discovery, schema inspection, filtered datastore queries, and triggering local scripts. Never ingest complete raw datasets into the LLM context. Generate or run local Python scripts to create small processed outputs in data/processed/. For the 1964 OCR track, process exactly 15 selected pages, save the page-selection manifest, raw OCR output per page, OCR quality metrics, and the cleaned historical CSV with page and amount traceability. Coordinate the 2025 pipeline, the 1964 OCR engine, and the first Streamlit dashboard draft.
